message:
feat(config): config format auto-detection and multi-format loading (wa-3dfxb.6)

Adds detection.rs with ConfigFormat enum (Toml/Lua/Wasm/Default),
detect_config() that probes standard locations in priority order
(env var → TOML → WASM → legacy Lua → defaults), and
load_detected_config() dispatch. Env-var tests use mutex to avoid
race conditions. 10 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
